settings.heading: LIFE HAPPENS
settings.subheading: Spills, stains, kids, pets. Our Mattress Protectors handle it all so your mattress doesn't have to.

settings.text: At BEDGEAR®, we don't believe in one-size-fits-all sleep. We personally fit every layer of your sleep system—from pillows and mattresses, to sheets, protectors, and comforters—to your unique body, sleep position, and temperature preference. Because we believe when you prioritize sleep first, everything else gets easier from there.

settings.heading: ONE SIZE DOES NOT FIT ALL

settings.text: Waking up stiff, sore, or sluggish is often a sign your pillow doesn’t fit how you sleep. For optimal alignment and support, take the PillowID® Quiz to find a pillow personally fit to you.

Personal Fit

When it comes to sleep, One Size Does Not Fit All™. That’s why Performance® bedding is personalized to fit your body type, sleep position, and temperature preference—so every night feels like it was made just for you. Because it was.

Unmatched Airflow

Overheating? Not here. Every product we create is built for breathability and designed to keep you cool, using our patented advanced airflow technology to prevent overheating and support your body’s natural temperature regulation.

Eco-friendly

In an industry overflowing with waste, we're committed to keeping you—and the planet—comfortable through durable designs, recycled materials, and eco-conscious practices that maximize your sleep quality while minimizing waste.

settings.title: Perfect Pillow
settings.text: I’ve been trying to find a pillow to help my neck, shoulders, and back not hurt so much, and this one almost immediately started helping.
settings.author: Claudia

settings.title: Great Pillow. Super Cold.
settings.text: Keeps me cool at night and I was always hot. Never even fails to stay cold great cooling technology. Great comfortable pillow overall. Best I've ever got.
settings.author: Natalie

settings.title: Best Sleep
settings.text: Excellent product! I should have found these pillows years ago. My quality of sleep has greatly improved.
settings.author: Dana

settings.title: Keep You Cool
settings.text: BEDGEAR has excellent products. Keeps me cool and comfortable all night. Highly recommend!
settings.author: Danielle

settings.title: I’ll never use anything else!
settings.text: These are the best sheets we’ve ever had. Everything from touch to temperature regulation is perfect. We don’t want to use anything else ever again.
settings.author: PETER J.

settings.title: Pregnant woman’s dream!
settings.text: I’m eight months pregnant and currently running warm, so the cooling technology of this mattress protector provides the level of cooling that I need right now.
settings.author: NICOLETTE Z.
